title: Actions and Stuff
short: Actions & Stuff é um pacote de recursos para Minecraft que vai muito além de simples texturas, adicionando animações e modelos 3D.
description:
O Pacote de Animação que Você Não Sabia Que Precisava: Dê vida ao seu mundo com novas animações, partículas, texturas e muito mais!

- Animações do jogador (1ª e 3ª pessoa)
- Novas e aprimoradas animações de mob
- Modelos de itens 3D
- Armadura Personalizada
- Uma Revisão de Textura Completa e Fiel
- Compatível com texturas de baunilha ou seus próprios pacotes de textura
- Agora com 100% visuais mais vibrantes
author: Oreville Studios

title: Addon thirst on
short: Este addon adiciona dois novos sistemas de sobrevivência: sede e temperatura, tornando a experiência de jogo mais realista e desafiadora.
description:
Visão Geral
Este addon adiciona dois novos sistemas de sobrevivência: sede e temperatura, tornando a experiência de jogo mais realista e desafiadora.

Mecânicas Principais
Sede (Thirst)
Uma nova barra de hidratação aparece na tela

A sede é afetada por temperatura, efeitos de status e consumo de comida

Quando a barra fica abaixo de 3 níveis, aparecem efeitos visuais de sede

Como se hidratar: batendo na água (beber diretamente), usando Water Flask ou garrafa de água comum

Temperatura
O jogador absorve a temperatura do ambiente (varia por bioma, compatível com biomas personalizados)

Sobreaquecimento: ultrapassar o limite causa dano de queimadura

Congelamento: cair abaixo do limite causa morte instantânea

Para resistir, você precisa de armaduras com modificadores de resistência térmica

Itens Incluídos
Item	Função
Winter Armor & Desert Armor	Armaduras para climas extremos (defesa igual couro)
Diving Helmet	Capacete de mergulho melhorado (com tanque de oxigênio)
Termômetro	Mostra a temperatura da área (slot de amuleto)
Heated Stone	Mantém o jogador aquecido (pode ser recarregada na fornalha)
Water Flask	Água filtrada para hidratação
Hot/Cool Drink	Muda a temperatura temporariamente por 8 minutos
Sewing Tool + Fabric	Aplica atributos térmicos às armaduras
Novas Barras/Indicadores
Thirst Bar – hidratação atual

Soaked Indicator – nível de molhado (afeta absorção de temperatura)

Temperature Resistance Bar – resistência fornecida pela armadura

Burnt Heart / Frozen Heart – limites de queimadura e congelamento

Player Temperature – temperatura corporal atual

Requisitos Obrigatórios
UI Queue – necessário para a interface funcionar

Forging Table – necessário para as receitas personalizadas

Opcionais
Novelty API – adiciona slot de amuleto para o termômetro

Compatibilidade para Desenvolvedores
O addon permite que outros criadores adicionem compatibilidade via:

Componente personalizado (adventure_condiment:thirst / adventure_condiment:temperature)

Módulo JavaScript (AdventureCondimentModule.js)

Versões Suportadas
1.21.100

1.21.90

title: Core Craft - A Vanilla Expansion | NEW: Villages Update
short: Core Craft transforms Minecraft into a richer survival-RPG experience packed with new adventures, creatures, and ways to play.
description:
Core Craft transforms Minecraft into a richer survival-RPG experience packed with new adventures, creatures, and ways to play. Explore a world full of quests, structures, unique mobs, and immersive systems designed to make your gameplay deeper and more rewarding.
Key Features
Quest System – Meet the Quest Master, collect tasks, and track your progress with the Quest Book. Earn rewards by completing objectives or restart quests for a new challenge.
New Mobs – Encounter fresh wildlife, dangerous monsters, and even mystical beings like mermaids and sirens.
Expanded Survival – Grow new crops, cook fresh recipes, and discover unique farming and cooking mechanics.
World Variety – Decorate your home with furniture, explore lush foliage, and collect rare resources such as Ruby.
Built-in Guidebook – Use the Core Craft Wiki Book to learn about every new feature without leaving the game.
Step into Core Craft and give your Minecraft world new life with quests, creatures, and creative possibilities!
author: By CoreCraft

title: Place Items
short: Place Items is a addon that enables the player to put many vanilla items in the ground, as decoration or as utility.
description: Place Items is a addon that enables the player to put many vanilla items in the ground, as decoration or as utility. Tools can be rested in the wall and rotated to the player desire. Place items addon let you place any item that ussually is not placable, by doing so you can decorate your house with items that you gather in your adventures. To place and move the items just Crouch + Right Click.
author: Alchemy_Studios

title: Working Projector
short: Adding your own custom video inside Minecraft!!
description: Watching videos in Minecraft? It might sound unbelievable, but now, thanks to this Add-On, it's a reality! Introducing Working Projector, an Add-On that enables you to seamlessly play videos in Minecraft. Choose any video you desire—add it to our WebApp, and voila, you now have a projector that can project videos onto a wall, allowing you to watch videos in Minecraft like never before! TO ADD YOUR OWN VIDEOS, YOU NEED TO UPLOAD THEM TO THE WEBAPP! https://blockstate.team/projects/working-projector
author: BlockStateTeam

title: Cinecam
short: Create cinematic masterpieces with professional camera.
description:
Create cinematic masterpieces with professional camera tools and smooth path animations.
- Path Camera with visual particle paths and smooth cinematic shots
- Multiple modes: Shoulder Surf, Drone, 360 Drone, Static placement
- Admin tools for managing cameras and global settings
- Licensed by SE7ENDAYS Studio and published by BLOCKLAB Studios.
author: BLOCKLAB

title: Rise and Survive – Progressive Zombie Apocalypse.
short: Rise and Survive is a progression-based apocalypse addon where zombies grow stronger every day.
description:
Evolving Zombies & Growing Difficulty
A dynamic difficulty bar increases every day, boosting zombie spawn rates.
Every 8 days, zombies move faster, grow stronger, and may unlock new abilities.
Higher difficulty = higher chance of zombies spawning with armor and weapons.
Unique Zombie Classes - Each zombie type brings new threats, new behaviors, and new strategies:
Miner Zombies – break blocks to reach you (faster on higher difficulty).
Block Placer Zombies – tower up, bridge, and chase you no matter how high you build.
Witch Zombies – throw and drink potions.
Bomber Zombies – throw TNT (damage-only).
Ender Zombies – teleport using ender pearls.
Jumpers – leap at you and onto blocks.
Crawlers – crawl through small spaces.
Revealers – scream to expose your location, then flee.
Spitter - shoots spit from a distance.
Horde Leaders

Giant – jumps and summons fangs.
Tank – incredibly tough.
Necromancer – summons more zombies.
Zombies can also spawn with various potion effects like Speed or Fire Resistance.
All vanilla hostile mobs are disabled, but their loot is obtainable by killing zombies.
Horde & Blood Moon System
Bloodmoon occurs every 8 days
Hordes spawn randomly 15 blocks away, always aware of your location.
Horde size scales with difficulty (customizable in settings).
author: Ranzie
